if.test: (skip_team_schedule_scope == null or skip_team_schedule_scope == '') and login_user_id != null and login_user_id != '' and (role_manage_id == null or role_manage_id == '' or role_manage_id != '1')

(pd.skip_team_schedule_scope == null or pd.skip_team_schedule_scope == '') and pd.login_user_id != null and pd.login_user_id != '' and (pd.role_manage_id == null or pd.role_manage_id == '' or pd.role_manage_id != '1')

mapper.sql: su.id id, su.schedule_id schedule_id, su.task_name task_name, su.task_content task_content, su.assigner_id assigner_id, su.assignee_id assignee_id, su.assignee_id assignees_id, su.deadline deadline, su.status status, su.schedule_type_code schedule_type_code, su.create_time create_time, su.update_time update_time
mapper.insert: insert into app_schedule_task (schedule_id, task_name, task_content, assigner_id, assignee_id, deadline, status, schedule_type_code, create_time, update_time) values (#{schedule_id}, #{task_name}, #{task_content}, #{assigner_id}, #{assignee_id}, #{deadline}, #{status}, #{schedule_type_code}, now(), now())
mapper.update:
UPDATE app_schedule_task
schedule_id = #{schedule_id}, task_name = #{task_name}, task_content = #{task_content}, assigner_id = #{assigner_id}, assignee_id = #{assignee_id}, deadline = #{deadline}, status = #{status}, schedule_type_code = #{schedule_type_code},
update_time = now(),
WHERE id = #{id};
mapper.select:
SELECT
,schedule_id.id as schedule_id_id1 ,schedule_id.team_id as schedule_id_team_id1 ,schedule_id.title as schedule_id_title1 ,schedule_id.content as schedule_id_content1 ,schedule_id.start_time as schedule_id_start_time1 ,schedule_id.end_time as schedule_id_end_time1 ,schedule_id.creator_id as schedule_id_creator_id1 ,schedule_id.status as schedule_id_status1 ,schedule_id.create_time as schedule_id_create_time1 ,schedule_id.update_time as schedule_id_update_time1 ,assigner_id.id as assigner_id_id1 ,assigner_id.USERNAME as assigner_id_USERNAME1 ,assigner_id.PASSWORD as assigner_id_PASSWORD1 ,assigner_id.NAME as assigner_id_NAME1 ,assigner_id.role_manage_id as assigner_id_role_manage_id1 ,assigner_id.create_time as assigner_id_create_time1 ,assigner_id.update_time as assigner_id_update_time1 ,assigner_id.signature as assigner_id_signature1 ,assignee_id.id as assignee_id_id1 ,COALESCE(assignee_id.USERNAME, app_assignee.username) as assignee_id_USERNAME1 ,COALESCE(assignee_id.USERNAME, app_assignee.username, CASE WHEN su.assignee_id IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR),'')) = '' THEN '(未分配)' ELSE CONCAT('ID:', TRIM(CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR)), '（无匹配账号）') END) AS assignees_id_USERNAME1 ,assignee_id.PASSWORD as assignee_id_PASSWORD1 ,assignee_id.NAME as assignee_id_NAME1 ,assignee_id.role_manage_id as assignee_id_role_manage_id1 ,assignee_id.create_time as assignee_id_create_time1 ,assignee_id.update_time as assignee_id_update_time1 ,assignee_id.signature as assignee_id_signature1 ,stype.type_name as schedule_type_name1 FROM app_schedule_task su
left join app_team_schedule schedule_id on schedule_id.id=su.schedule_id left join sys_user assigner_id on CAST(assigner_id.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.assigner_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join sys_user assignee_id on CAST(assignee_id.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.assignee_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join app_user app_assignee on CAST(app_assignee.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.assignee_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join app_schedule_type stype on stype.type_code = su.schedule_type_code where 1 = 1 and su.id = #{id} and su.schedule_id = #{schedule_id} and su.task_name = #{task_name} and su.task_content = #{task_content} and su.assigner_id = #{assigner_id} and su.assignee_id = #{assignee_id} and su.assignee_id = #{assignees_id}
and (su.assignee_id = #{participant_user_id} or su.assigner_id = #{participant_user_id})
AND DATE(su.deadline) = CURDATE()
AND YEARWEEK(su.deadline, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1)
AND YEAR(su.deadline) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(su.deadline) = MONTH(NOW())
AND CAST(IFNULL(su.status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1')
and su.deadline = #{deadline} and su.status = #{status} and su.schedule_type_code = #{schedule_type_code} and su.create_time = #{create_time} and su.update_time = #{update_time}

SELECT
,schedule_id.id as schedule_id_id1 ,schedule_id.team_id as schedule_id_team_id1 ,schedule_id.title as schedule_id_title1 ,schedule_id.content as schedule_id_content1 ,schedule_id.start_time as schedule_id_start_time1 ,schedule_id.end_time as schedule_id_end_time1 ,schedule_id.creator_id as schedule_id_creator_id1 ,schedule_id.status as schedule_id_status1 ,schedule_id.create_time as schedule_id_create_time1 ,schedule_id.update_time as schedule_id_update_time1 ,assigner_id.id as assigner_id_id1 ,assigner_id.USERNAME as assigner_id_USERNAME1 ,assigner_id.PASSWORD as assigner_id_PASSWORD1 ,assigner_id.NAME as assigner_id_NAME1 ,assigner_id.role_manage_id as assigner_id_role_manage_id1 ,assigner_id.create_time as assigner_id_create_time1 ,assigner_id.update_time as assigner_id_update_time1 ,assigner_id.signature as assigner_id_signature1 ,assignee_id.id as assignee_id_id1 ,COALESCE(assignee_id.USERNAME, app_assignee.username) as assignee_id_USERNAME1 ,COALESCE(assignee_id.USERNAME, app_assignee.username, CASE WHEN su.assignee_id IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR),'')) = '' THEN '(未分配)' ELSE CONCAT('ID:', TRIM(CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR)), '（无匹配账号）') END) AS assignees_id_USERNAME1 ,assignee_id.PASSWORD as assignee_id_PASSWORD1 ,assignee_id.NAME as assignee_id_NAME1 ,assignee_id.role_manage_id as assignee_id_role_manage_id1 ,assignee_id.create_time as assignee_id_create_time1 ,assignee_id.update_time as assignee_id_update_time1 ,assignee_id.signature as assignee_id_signature1 ,stype.type_name as schedule_type_name1
,(SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_schedule_favorite fav WHERE CAST(fav.user_id AS CHAR) = CAST(#{pd.user_id} AS CHAR) AND CAST(fav.task_id AS CHAR) = CAST(su.id AS CHAR)) AS favorited
FROM app_schedule_task su
left join app_team_schedule schedule_id on schedule_id.id=su.schedule_id left join sys_user assigner_id on CAST(assigner_id.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.assigner_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join sys_user assignee_id on CAST(assignee_id.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.assignee_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join app_user app_assignee on CAST(app_assignee.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(IFNULL(su.assignee_id,'') AS CHAR)) left join app_schedule_type stype on stype.type_code = su.schedule_type_code where 1 = 1 and su.id = #{pd.id} and su.schedule_id = #{pd.schedule_id} and su.task_name = #{pd.task_name} and su.task_content = #{pd.task_content} and su.assigner_id = #{pd.assigner_id} and su.assignee_id = #{pd.assignee_id} and su.assignee_id = #{pd.assignees_id}
and (su.assignee_id = #{pd.participant_user_id} or su.assigner_id = #{pd.participant_user_id})
AND DATE(su.deadline) = CURDATE()
AND YEARWEEK(su.deadline, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1)
AND YEAR(su.deadline) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(su.deadline) = MONTH(NOW())
AND CAST(IFNULL(su.status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1')
and su.deadline = #{pd.deadline} and su.status = #{pd.status} and su.schedule_type_code = #{pd.schedule_type_code} and su.create_time = #{pd.create_time} and su.update_time = #{pd.update_time}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM sys_user su WHERE CAST(su.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(#{assigner_id} AS CHAR)) AND CAST(IFNULL(su.role_manage_id,'') AS CHAR) IN ('1','2') AND CAST(IFNULL(su.account_status,'1') AS CHAR) = '1'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM app_user au WHERE CAST(au.id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(#{assignee_id} AS CHAR)) AND CAST(IFNULL(au.account_status,'1') AS CHAR) = '1'

SELECT COUNT(1) AS total_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) = '3' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS overdue_cnt FROM app_schedule_task WHERE (assignee_id = #{uid} OR assigner_id = #{uid})

SELECT IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(schedule_type_code),''), '_none') AS type_code, COUNT(1) AS cnt FROM app_schedule_task WHERE (assignee_id = #{uid} OR assigner_id = #{uid}) GROUP BY IFNULL(NULLIF(TRIM(schedule_type_code),''), '_none')

SELECT COUNT(1) AS done_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN su.deadline IS NULL OR TRIM(IFNULL(CAST(su.deadline AS CHAR), '')) = '' THEN 1 WHEN COALESCE(su.update_time, su.create_time) <= su.deadline THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS on_time_cnt FROM app_schedule_task su WHERE (CAST(su.assignee_id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(#{uid} AS CHAR)) OR CAST(su.assigner_id AS CHAR) = TRIM(CAST(#{uid} AS CHAR))) AND CAST(IFNULL(su.status, '') AS CHAR) = '2'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_schedule_task WHERE (assignee_id = #{assignees_id} OR assigner_id = #{assignees_id})
AND DATE(deadline) = CURDATE()
AND YEARWEEK(deadline, 1) = YEARWEEK(NOW(), 1)
AND YEAR(deadline) = YEAR(NOW()) AND MONTH(deadline) = MONTH(NOW())
AND CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0','1')

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT tid) FROM ( SELECT CAST(team_id AS CHAR) AS tid FROM app_team_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('1') UNION SELECT CAST(id AS CHAR) AS tid FROM app_team WHERE (CAST(creator_id AS CHAR) = CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR) OR CAST(admin_id AS CHAR) = CAST(#{userId} AS CHAR)) AND CAST(IFNULL(status,'') AS CHAR) = '1' ) u

SELECT ast.id, ast.task_name AS title, ast.task_content AS description, DATE_FORMAT(ast.deadline, '%H:%i') AS start_time, DATE_FORMAT(ast.deadline, '%H:%i') AS end_time, CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(ast.deadline, '%H:%i'), ' - ', DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(ast.deadline, INTERVAL 1 HOUR), '%H:%i')) AS time, ast.status, ast.schedule_id FROM app_schedule_task ast WHERE (ast.assignee_id = #{userId} OR ast.assigner_id = #{userId}) AND DATE(ast.deadline) = CURDATE() AND CAST(IFNULL(ast.status,'') AS CHAR) IN ('0', '1') ORDER BY ast.deadline ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT id, title, content, publisher_id, publish_time, status FROM app_notice WHERE status = '1' ORDER BY publish_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT tu.id, CONCAT('团队邀请：', IFNULL(t.team_name, CONCAT('团队#', tu.team_id)), '（', CASE CAST(IFNULL(tu.join_type,'') AS CHAR) WHEN '1' THEN '申请加入' WHEN '2' THEN '邀请加入' ELSE IFNULL(tu.join_type,'未知类型') END, '）') AS title, CONCAT('请前往「团队用户关联」处理，当前状态：待审核') AS content, tu.join_time AS publish_time, '1' AS status FROM app_team_user tu LEFT JOIN app_team t ON CAST(t.id AS CHAR)=CAST(tu.team_id AS CHAR) WHERE CAST(IFNULL(tu.user_id,'') AS CHAR)=CAST(#{uid} AS CHAR) AND CAST(IFNULL(tu.status,'') AS CHAR)='0' ORDER BY tu.id DESC LIMIT 20
